ValidationRule.description: The Delivery Date Estimate is mandatory if the Status is Work In Progress
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( !$User.BypassValidationRules__c, AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Client_delivery_request", ISPICKVAL(Status,'Work in progress'), ISBLANK(Delivery_Date_Estimate__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Delivery Date Estimate is mandatory if the Status is Work In Progress
